title: Skyblock Environmentalist
description: This texture pack retextures Hypixel Skyblock replacing ALL custom ores / blocks and overhauling some bland areas to look better
body:
**###THIS PACK REQUIRES FIRAMAMENT###**

https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament

This texture pack aims to stop the larp thinking light blue wool is some magical metal, or polished diorite being anything more than a slightly better diorite, all by replacing all custom blocks with their own unique, vanillah ish textures

Besides that the pack also aims to enhance the looks of certain areas, such as the nether and mining islands.

## Glacite Lake
![Glacite Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6552297f082111e0acc9512d332090f57b3efb6a_0.webp)


## Smoldering Tomb
![Crimson Isle Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a604ead87bba22203d596094a4c6a52ac54dba4_0.webp)

The pack currently modifies the following aspects of the game:

1. The Rift
-    Timite
-    Living Metal
2. Dwarven Mines
-    Mithril
-    Titanium
-    Dark Monolith
-    Replaces ores blocks with raw ore blocks (why would you find natural gold / iron???)
-    Fallen Stars / Star cluster
-    The Mist
-    Atmosphere change
3. Crimson Isle
-    Opal
-    Sulphur
-    Atmosphere change
4. Crystal Hollows
-    All gemstones
-    Hard stone is now deepslate
-    Magma fields got a new atmosphere change
5. Glaciate tunnels / Mineshafts
-    All gemstones
-    Umber
-    Tungsten
-    Glacite
-    Atmosphere change
